# Pull Request

## Description
<!-- Mô tả ngắn gọn về những thay đổi trong PR này -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Đánh dấu [x] vào các mục phù hợp -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Code style update (formatting, renaming)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change

## Related Issues
<!-- Link đến issues liên quan -->
Closes #(issue number)

## Changes Made
<!-- Liệt kê các thay đổi chính -->

- 
- 
- 

## Components Affected
<!-- Đánh dấu các components bị ảnh hưởng -->

- [ ] Multi-Region Architecture
- [ ] Hybrid Cloud Connectivity
- [ ] Disaster Recovery
- [ ] Security & Compliance
- [ ] High Availability
- [ ] Microservices
- [ ] Data Analytics
- [ ] Serverless
- [ ] Cost Optimization
- [ ] Migration
- [ ] Monitoring
- [ ] Infrastructure as Code

## Testing
<!-- Mô tả cách test các thay đổi -->

### Unit Tests
- [ ] All unit tests pass
- [ ] New unit tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Code coverage maintained or improved

### Property-Based Tests
- [ ] Property tests pass (minimum 100 iterations)
- [ ] New properties added if applicable

### Integration Tests
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Tested in dev environment

### Manual Testing
<!-- Mô tả các bước test thủ công đã thực hiện -->

1. 
2. 
3. 

## CDK Validation
- [ ] `cdk synth` runs successfully
- [ ] `cdk diff` reviewed and understood
- [ ] No unexpected resource changes

## Cost Impact
<!-- Ước tính impact về chi phí -->

- Estimated monthly cost change: $___
- Justification: 

## Security Considerations
<!-- Các vấn đề bảo mật cần lưu ý -->

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] IAM policies follow least privilege
- [ ] Encryption enabled where required
- [ ] Security groups properly configured

## Documentation
- [ ] Code comments added/updated
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] Architecture diagrams updated if needed
- [ ] API documentation updated if needed

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Screenshots (if applicable)
<!-- Thêm screenshots nếu có UI changes hoặc architecture diagrams -->
